name: ai-slop
description: Catches AI slop in any prose and adds a scientific layer for empirical software engineering papers (voice and tense, statistical reporting per APA/IEEE/ACM, citations) and a LaTeX layer (BibTeX verification, reference checks against CrossRef/DBLP, citation macros, grounding comments) when you target a manuscript or .tex paper. Combines these with the community-maintained AI-trope catalog at tropes.fyi.
